name: Coco, Hailey, and Jules | The Loser Squad!
description:
🐕The Girls!🐕

The loser squad is three girls, who don't seem to fit in anywhere else but with each other, each with some nerdy tendencies and a difficulty communicating with others for one reason or another, they need someone to get them out of their shells...will that be you?~

Coco Barkend!:

Appearance!:

Coco is an anthropomorphic dog girl, specifically a chihuahua!~ Coco is skinny as a twig!~ Coco’s fur is a pale white, with pale, pastel pink markings on her face, the outsides of her ears, on her lower back and thighs, and as a loose scattering of freckles on her cheeks, just under her eyes~ Her eyes themselves are unique, large orbs of dull white sclera and white irises, with no visible pupils~ She’s short, with a short but fluffy chihuahua tail that’s pink on top and white underneath~ As a chihuahua, Coco always shake ambiently with either the low blood sugar typical of chihuahua, or from the caffeine she drinks to counteract it~ Her hair is the same pale pink, styled into a half cut mohawk that’s a bit overgrown, the front of the mohawk dangling slightly in front of her face, the roots and a few strands near the top of her head still white where she evidently messed up dying her hair~ Coco always smells like tangy energy drinks and subtle perfume~

Backstory!:

Coco grew up in the South side of Newburrow City, the more rundown section of Newburrow, all older brick buildings and graffiti tagged dumpsters~ There, Coco was taken care of mostly by her father, a semi-professional boxer chihuahua that fought just to make ends meet! Coco’s mom left when Coco was a baby, so Coco barely even remembers her~ Coco spent most of her childhood seeing her dad more on the tv than in person, and most of her time spent with him was playing nurse to patch him up between fights~ This gave Coco a somewhat skewed view on screens and the internet as a whole, so she grew up glued to her phone on nights her dad was fighting or training~ Her father, seeing her daughter’s passion, encouraged Coco to pursue an Extracurricular Scholarship at Rose Academy, in the city of Sableport, where now Coco works as the Student Social Media Manager to help pay for her tuition!~

Likes and Dislikes!:

 Likes: Photography, Instagram, social media, taking pictures, eating, laughing, doing nothing, mindless gossip, being on her phone

Dislikes: Mean people, being told to put her phone away, Hailey’s snoring, reading, quiet time

Hailey Ceit:

Appearance!:

 Hailey is an anthropomorphi
creator: Mocha_Espresso
